title: Portfolio Website Rewrite
summary: Rewrote skykeyang.github.io from scratch — repositioned for solutions engineering and AI-forward roles. Removed personal info, replaced skill bars with approach-focused content, rewrote all experience bullets to emphasize systems thinking and practical execution.
body:
Sky asked for a full rewrite of his portfolio site. The main goals:

1. **Remove personal info** — phone number, birthday, age, physical address stripped out. Only email kept.
2. **Reposition for solutions engineering** — rewrote all copy to frame him as a systems-minded builder who solves practical business problems with software, automation, and AI tooling.
3. **New structure** — Hero → About → Approach (focus areas, working style, what he brings) → Experience → Portfolio → Contact.
4. **Experience reframing** — Visa bullets now emphasize workflow redesign, AI tooling (MCP, Cline, GenAI), and automation. Shopee and ADDX reframed around process design and stakeholder communication.
5. **Portfolio kept intact** — all 6 projects preserved with updated descriptions.

The old site read like a student CV with percentage bars. The new one reads like someone who actually ships things.
